name: ravenclaude-core
description: Domain-neutral Team Lead + specialized agents pattern for Claude Code. Bundles 14 specialists, a dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, hooks, and templates for stakeholder prose, design specs, RAID logs, and partner-success artifacts. v0.8.0: /wrap + scenario-retrieval. v0.9.0: pre-action decision-tree traversal + Researcher staleness check. v0.10.0: every agent ships example-scenario frontmatter. **v0.11.0 — the Capability Grounding Protocol's fourth load-bearing clause:** pre-action environment-context check + Team Lead session-start orientation logic. Consumers create `.ravenclaude/environment-context.md` from a marketplace template; the Team Lead reads it at session start; the new CGP clause checks before declaring blocked / asking authorization. Closes the 'did you try X?' round-trip on pre-authorized actions. Implements proposal 2026-05-22-001.
